title: Managing Workloads — External tools
text:
This section lists only the most common tools used for managing workloads on Kubernetes. To see a larger list, view
Application definition and image build
in the
CNCF
Landscape.
Helm
is a tool for managing packages of pre-configured
Kubernetes resources. These packages are known as
Helm charts
.
Kustomize
traverses a Kubernetes manifest to add, remove or update configuration options.
It is available both as a standalone binary and as a
native feature
of kubectl.
